questions.q: Who announced their resignation as the Acting Director of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) in mid-April 2026?
Which singer was arrested in April 2026 in connection with the murder of a 14-year-old girl whose remains were found in his Tesla?
An ICE agent was charged with felony assault in Minnesota in April 2026 for allegedly doing what to motorists during a road rage incident?
options: Pointing his service weapon at them
Ramming their car with his unmarked SUV
Firing a warning shot into the air
questions.correctText: Pointing his service weapon at them

questions.q: Which former Lieutenant Governor of Virginia was found dead along with his wife in an apparent murder-suicide in April 2026?
In April 2026, a man was arrested after walking into the headquarters of which major health insurer in Hartford, Connecticut, while carrying a backpack containing an AR-style pistol?
